cards.title: Nvidia CEO Eyes $200B AI Agent CPU Market
cards.body: Jensen Huang predicts the next major growth opportunity for Nvidia will be CPUs designed specifically for AI agents, worth approximately $200 billion. This represents a significant new market segment beyond traditional data center infrastructure.

cards.title: Anthropic Projects First Profitable Quarter
cards.body: Anthropic told investors it will more than double revenue to around $10.9 billion in Q2. The AI company is approaching profitability as demand for its services accelerates.

cards.title: xAI Lost $6.4B in 2025, Expanding Aggressively
cards.body: SpaceX's IPO filing reveals Elon Musk's xAI burned $6.4 billion last year while planning massive Grok expansion. The filing offers the first public financial details of Musk's AI ambitions.

cards.title: Nvidia Reports Record Revenue, Holds $43B Startup Stakes
cards.body: Nvidia announced record revenue but forecasted slower growth in the following quarter. The company revealed it holds $43 billion in startup holdings across its investment portfolio.

cards.title: xAI Ordering $2.8B in Natural Gas Turbines
cards.body: Elon Musk's xAI plans to purchase $2.8 billion worth of natural gas turbines over three years. The massive energy investment reflects the computational demands of scaling Grok.

cards.title: Anthropic Paying xAI $1.25B Monthly for Compute
cards.body: Anthropic agreed to purchase compute resources from xAI in a landmark deal valued at $1.25 billion per month. The arrangement reflects significant collaboration between rival AI companies.

cards.title: OpenAI Claims Solving 80-Year-Old Math Problem
cards.body: OpenAI claims its reasoning model disproved a geometry conjecture unsolved since 1946, with backing from mathematicians. This marks a significant milestone in AI's ability to tackle complex mathematical problems.

cards.title: Andrew Ng Backed IrisGo Launches AI Desktop Assistant
cards.body: IrisGo, co-founded with backing from Andrew Ng, functions as an AI assistant that watches desktop activity and automates task completion. The startup aims to become an essential AI productivity tool.

cards.title: OpenAI Preparing for September IPO
cards.body: Following Elon Musk's failed lawsuit, OpenAI is reportedly advancing plans for an IPO potentially happening in September. The public offering could value the AI company at unprecedented levels.

cards.title: AI Search Startups Becoming Hot Investment Target
cards.body: AI search has emerged as one of the most attractive consumer AI segments for investors. Multiple startups are competing to disrupt traditional search with AI-powered alternatives.

cards.title: Stability AI Releases Audio Model Generating 6-Minute Songs
cards.body: Stability Audio 3.0 can generate two-minute tracks and runs efficiently on-device. The new model represents a major advancement in AI-generated music capabilities.

cards.title: NanoClaw Creator Rejects $20M Offer, Raises $12M
cards.body: NanoClaw's creator turned down a $20 million buyout and instead raised $12 million in seed funding. The secure AI container platform runs sandboxed to assist marketing and automation tasks.

cards.title: Figma Adds AI Agent to Collaborative Canvas
cards.body: Figma's new AI assistant responds to natural language prompts to generate designs, edit existing work, and automate iterations. The tool makes design automation accessible to users of all skill levels.

cards.title: Google Declares Itself AI Design Contender
cards.body: Google announced new AI design tools aimed at accessibility for teachers and small business owners at IO 2026. The company is expanding its position in the competitive AI market.

cards.title: Gmail Now Supports Conversational AI Voice Search
cards.body: Google expanded Gmail with conversational voice search powered by Gemini at IO 2026. Users can now ask AI to find and retrieve buried email details through natural language.

cards.title: Google Launches Information AI Agents for Monitoring
cards.body: Google is launching AI-powered information agents that monitor topics in the background and proactively alert users to updates. The agents go beyond standard search to provide intelligent monitoring.

cards.title: Ocean Raises $28M to Fight AI Email Phishing
cards.body: Ocean's agentic email security platform uses AI to analyze email context and detect fraud and impersonation attempts. The startup claims its technology provides comprehensive protection against AI-powered phishing.

cards.title: Musk Loses Lawsuit Against OpenAI and Sam Altman
cards.body: A jury unanimously rejected Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI founders, ruling his claims were barred by statute of limitations. The verdict confirmed that Musk's case lacked sufficient legal merit.

cards.title: Google Set to Remake Search With Agentic AI
cards.body: Google is preparing to fundamentally transform search using agentic AI capabilities in 2026. The shift represents a major reimagining of how users interact with search results.
